text: tap your thighs a little, tap your hands, then take a big breath, don’t hesitate to stretch, take up all the space you need. You will very slowly notice your hands on your thighs, notice your thighs on the floor, and then when you are ready, I suggest, at your own pace, very gently, that you bring your two smiles back to life.
